candidate_definition_hints.text: Somewhat janky implementation of Sonar Sampling (momentum based sampling) for ComfyUI along with an assortment of advanced noise tools (schedule noise types, composite and a lot more!)
A janky implementation of Sonar sampling (momentum-based sampling) for [ComfyUI](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI) as well as an assortment of advanced noise tools.
